page.title: Getting Started
page.description: Discover what Ayunis Core can do for you.
page.checkboxHint: Check off completed steps to track your progress.
page.hideHint: You can find this page anytime under Settings → Getting Started.

saveError: Could not save your progress. Please try again.

milestones.almostDone: Almost done — just a few more steps!
milestones.complete: All done — you are ready to go!

workspace.title: Set up workspace
workspace.description: Configure your workspace for your team.

skills.title: Discover skills
skills.description: Skills are specialized experts — like a data analyst or a document summarizer. Once added, they're automatically available in your chat.

knowledgeManagement.title: Knowledge management
knowledgeManagement.description: Create knowledge collections with your own documents and URLs — Ayunis Core uses this knowledge automatically for more precise answers.

advanced.title: Advanced features
advanced.description: Discover more features that make your daily work even more efficient.

workflows.title: Use cases
workflows.description: Try typical tasks and see what Ayunis Core can do for you.

configureModels.title: Review and configure models
configureModels.description: Check which models are enabled for your organization and adjust the default model if needed.
configureModels.spotlightDescription: Here you can see the available models. You can enable or disable models and change the default model above.

inviteColleagues.title: Invite colleagues
inviteColleagues.description: Invite your team so everyone can benefit from Ayunis Core.
inviteColleagues.spotlightDescription: Click here to invite new users via email. Invited colleagues can start using the platform right away.

createTeams.title: Create teams
createTeams.description: Organize your colleagues into teams for better collaboration.
createTeams.spotlightDescription: Click here to create a new team. Teams help you organize colleagues and manage permissions together.

sendFirstMessage.title: Start your first chat
sendFirstMessage.description: Send your first message and see how Ayunis Core can help — from writing texts to analysis and translations.
sendFirstMessage.prompt: Hello Ayunis Core! How can you help me in my daily work? Please give concrete examples.

uploadDocument.title: Upload a document
uploadDocument.description: Upload a PDF, Word, or Excel document and ask questions about it — Ayunis Core can summarize, analyze, and extract information.
uploadDocument.spotlightDescription: Click here to upload a document. Ayunis Core can summarize, analyze, or answer questions about it.

tryVoiceInput.title: Use voice input
tryVoiceInput.description: Dictate your message by microphone instead of typing — ideal for quick questions or on the go.
tryVoiceInput.spotlightDescription: Click the microphone to enter your message by voice. The recording is automatically converted to text.

anonymousMode.title: Enable anonymous mode
anonymousMode.description: Protect personal data automatically — names, addresses, and other sensitive information are anonymized before sending.
anonymousMode.spotlightDescription: Enable anonymous mode to automatically detect and anonymize personally identifiable information (PII) before it's sent to the model.

whatAreSkills.title: What are skills?
whatAreSkills.description: Skills are specialized experts for specific tasks — like a data analyst or a document summarizer. Have the details explained directly by Ayunis Core or check the documentation.
whatAreSkills.prompt: Please explain what skills are in Ayunis Core. What can I use them for, what examples are there, and how do they help me in my daily work? Give me a concise, easy-to-understand overview.

installSkill.title: Install a skill from the marketplace
installSkill.description: Browse the marketplace and install ready-made skills with one click.

createSkill.title: Create your own skill
createSkill.description: Create a skill tailored exactly to your tasks.
createSkill.spotlightDescription: Click here to create a new skill. Skills are reusable templates for common tasks.

useSkillInChat.title: Pin a skill
useSkillInChat.description: Skills activate automatically when they match your question. You can also pin them here to use them in a new chat.
useSkillInChat.spotlightDescription: Click the pin icon to attach a skill to new chats.

activateSkillInChat.title: Use a pinned skill in chat
activateSkillInChat.description: Your pinned skills appear as buttons below the chat input. Click one to use it explicitly in this chat — that way it's guaranteed to be applied.
activateSkillInChat.spotlightDescription: Here are your pinned skills. Click one to use it explicitly in this chat — that way it's guaranteed to be applied.

createKnowledgeBase.title: Create a knowledge collection
createKnowledgeBase.description: Create a knowledge collection to provide your own documents and web pages as a knowledge source for Ayunis Core.
createKnowledgeBase.spotlightDescription: Click here to create a new knowledge collection. You can then add documents and URLs.

addDocuments.title: Add documents
addDocuments.description: Upload PDFs, Word documents or add web URLs. Ayunis Core processes the content automatically and can answer questions based on it.
addDocuments.spotlightDescription: Upload PDFs or Word documents here, or add web URLs. Ayunis Core processes the content automatically and uses it to give you more accurate answers.

useKnowledgeBaseInChat.title: Use knowledge collection in chat
useKnowledgeBaseInChat.description: Add a knowledge collection to your chat via the plus icon. Ayunis Core will then include your own knowledge in its answers.
useKnowledgeBaseInChat.spotlightDescription: Use the plus icon to add knowledge collections to your chat. Ayunis Core then uses your own knowledge for more precise answers.

customInstructions.title: Set custom instructions
customInstructions.description: Define a personal system prompt that is automatically applied in every chat — e.g. tone, language, or role instructions.
customInstructions.spotlightDescription: Set a personal system prompt here. It will be automatically used in every new chat.

generateImage.title: Generate an image
generateImage.description: Ayunis Core can create images based on your description — ideal for presentations, drafts, or creative ideas. Requires an administrator to have enabled an image generation model.
generateImage.prompt: Create a modern, minimalist icon for a municipality app. The icon should show a stylized town hall, in blue and white tones, flat design.

switchTheme.title: Activate dark mode
switchTheme.description: Switch between light and dark design — easier on the eyes during long work days.
switchTheme.spotlightDescription: Activate dark mode here. The dark design is easier on the eyes, especially during extended use.

writeEmail.title: Write an email
writeEmail.description: Generate, e.g., a friendly invitation to a town hall meeting — with all the important details about location, time, and topics.
writeEmail.prompt:
Write and draft a friendly invitation email to the citizens for the next town hall meeting.

Occasion: presentation of the planned downtown revitalization and new mobility concepts. Date: Thursday, June 18, 2026, 6:30–8:30 p.m. in the town hall's citizens' hall. Mention that there will be an opportunity to chat over a small buffet afterwards, and ask attendees to RSVP informally by email to rathaus@samplecity.com. Keep the tone warm, welcoming, and close to the citizens.

createDocument.title: Create a document
createDocument.description: Generate structured documents like press releases, concept papers, or notices — Ayunis Core automatically opens an editor where you can continue working on the result.
createDocument.prompt:
Write a press release about the opening of the new Citizens' Service Center in our city.

Key facts:
- Opening: Monday, September 1, 2026, 10:00 a.m.
- Address: Main Street 12, 12345 Sampleton
- New services: digital application submission, shorter wait times through online appointment scheduling, barrier-free access, multilingual service (German, English, Turkish, Arabic)

Structure the press release with a strong headline, a short introduction, a main section with three key points, and a closing section including a press contact (press@sampleton.com, 0123/456789). Keep the tone factual but positive and citizen-friendly.

summarizeDocument.title: Summarize a document
summarizeDocument.description: Summarize long documents such as meeting minutes, notices, or proposals in a few sentences — ideal for file review or briefings to colleagues. The sample file is attached automatically.
summarizeDocument.prompt:
Attached are the minutes of our last city council meeting.

Please create a compact summary that includes:
- the 3–5 most important decisions and topics
- concrete numbers and data where relevant
- the next upcoming dates or steps

Keep the summary factual and clear — suitable as a briefing for colleagues who were not present.

analyzeData.title: Analyze & visualize data
analyzeData.description: Spot trends in tables and let Ayunis Core create a suitable chart (line, pie, or bar). The sample file is attached automatically.
analyzeData.prompt:
Attached is a CSV file with the participant numbers of our annual city run from 2019 to 2026, broken down by distance.

Please analyze the data as follows:
- Create a line chart showing how participant numbers per distance developed over the years.
- Calculate the total growth from 2019 to 2026 and name the most popular distance today.
- Summarize in three short bullet points what stands out — also with regard to the share of women and youth.

createFlowchart.title: Create a flowchart & process diagram
createFlowchart.description: Visualize administrative processes as a diagram — useful for training, concepts, or documentation.
createFlowchart.prompt:
Create a flowchart for the following administrative process:

A citizen submits a housing benefit application online. The case worker checks the completeness of the documents. If all documents are present, the application is reviewed on its merits and either approved or rejected — the citizen is informed in writing in each case. If documents are missing, the citizen receives a request for additional documents.

createCalendarEntry.title: Create a calendar entry
createCalendarEntry.description: Turn a brief description into a complete calendar entry with date, time, location, and agenda.
createCalendarEntry.prompt: Create a calendar entry for me: staff meeting with the Public Order department next Thursday from 2:00 to 3:30 p.m. in meeting room 3. Topic is the implementation of the new data protection guideline. Create title, location, time range, suggested participants, and a short agenda with three items.

webResearch.title: Run a web search
webResearch.description: Use web search to find current funding opportunities, studies, or best practices for your municipality.
webResearch.prompt: Which current federal and state funding programs in Germany are available for digitalization of municipal administrations? List the most important ones with funding amount, application deadline, and requirements — please include links to the application office.
